title: ExtractionRequest
description: The payload handed to messages.create(...) when running an extraction. Encodes FR-001 (formal schema) and FR-002 (forced tool choice). Presence of tool_choice.type == 'any' is asserted by tests/katas/005_defensive_extraction/unit/test_tool_choice_forced.py.

model.description: Claude model id used for the extraction.

messages.description: Conversation history. Stable-prefix (schema + instructions) / dynamic-suffix (source document) ordering per Principle III.

tools.description: Exactly one extraction tool is registered. Tool input_schema is generated from pydantic ExtractedRecord per D-002.

tool_choice.description: MUST pin the model to a tool call (FR-002). tool_choice.type == 'any' collapses to the single registered tool for this kata.

type.description: 'any' is the default for this kata (D-001); 'tool' is acceptable if a name is also supplied.
